title: 3 AI Projects Making Waves on Base This Week
summary: Base Hub highlights three promising AI projects on the Base blockchain. OpenGradient has 13 new models and 2M+ verified inferences, while AntSeedAI has 100+ paying users and 336 services.
body:
Base Hub has spotlighted three AI projects on the Base blockchain that are gaining traction. These projects are leveraging blockchain technology to offer unique AI services, showcasing the growing intersection of AI and decentralized platforms.

The first project, OpenGradient, focuses on proof-backed AI outputs. It has recently added 13 new models and achieved over 2 million verified inferences. This platform ensures the integrity and verifiability of AI-generated content, which is crucial for applications requiring high levels of trust and accuracy.

AntSeedAI is another notable project, operating as a peer-to-peer (P2P) AI services network on Base. It has already consumed over 10 billion tokens, with 100+ paying users and 336 services available. This network facilitates direct transactions between AI service providers and consumers, eliminating intermediaries and reducing costs.

These projects highlight the potential of AI on blockchain platforms to offer innovative and decentralized solutions. For everyday users, this means access to more transparent, secure, and cost-effective AI services. As these projects continue to grow, they could set new standards for AI applications in the blockchain space.

To stay updated on these developments, keep an eye on the progress of OpenGradient, AntSeedAI, and dphnAI. These projects are likely to introduce new features and services that could benefit a wide range of users. Follow their updates to take advantage of the latest advancements in AI and blockchain technology.
twitterThread: AI on Base is heating up! OpenGradient just hit 2M+ verified inferences with 13 new models. What does this mean for trust in AI output?
AntSeedAI is a P2P AI network with 100+ paying users and 336 services. Decentralized AI could be the future of custom, uncensored AI tools.

Want in? Follow @OpenGradient, @AntSeedAI, and @dphnAI for updates. The future of AI is decentralized, and it's happening on Base. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-05-14-3-ai-projects-making-waves-on-base-this-week
standaloneTweet: AI on blockchain is real! OpenGradient has 2M+ verified inferences, and AntSeedAI has 100+ paying users. The future of AI is decentralized.
